summary: Automate publishing a Claude Code stack to the Cables community marketplace — detect setup, generate stack.json, validate, tag, and open the submission PR.

inputs.name: stack_slug
inputs.description: Kebab-case unique identifier for the stack on frenxt.com.

inputs.name: stack_purpose
inputs.description: fullstack-development | ai-agent-development | ux-design | qa-release | marketing-growth | meta | other

inputs.name: publisher_repo
inputs.description: owner/repo where the stack.json lives — existing or to be created.

outputs.name: submission_pr_url
outputs.description: The opened PR against frenxt/cables with the submission pointer file.

outputs.name: stack_json_path
outputs.description: Location of the generated .cables/stack.json in the publisher repo.

workflow_steps: Detect existing Claude plugins, Codex plugins, marketplaces, and local skills.
Collect stack metadata (slug, title, purpose, publisher repo) from the user.
Prepare the publisher repo (new via gh repo create or use existing).
Generate .cables/stack.json from the detected setup + user input.
Bundle user-approved skills into .claude/skills/ in the publisher repo.
Run frenxt stack-publish locally — loop on REJECTED until APPROVED or user-confirmed NEEDS REVIEW.
Commit, tag v0.1.0, push with tags.
Fork frenxt/cables, add community-stacks/<slug>.json submission pointer, push, open PR.
Report PR URL and next steps to the user.

verification.smoke_test: Run through a dry-run scenario with a fake stack — confirm stack.json passes validation and submission pointer format is correct.
